text:
/ci1 1 遠くに攻撃してくるヤツも来とるな。
ほら、あの杖もっとるヤツや。

/ci1 1 杖を掲げるのが攻撃の合図やから
それ見たら、すぐに移動するんやで。

/ci1 1 Now we've got one that attacks from a
distance. Yeah, the one with the staff.

/ci1 1 When it raises its staff, it's gonna
strike, so that's your cue to get the heck
outta the way.

遠くに攻撃してくるヤツも来とるな。
ほら、あの杖もっとるヤツや。

杖を掲げるのが攻撃の合図やから
それ見たら、すぐに移動するんやで。

Now we've got one that attacks from
a distance. Yeah, the one with the staff.

When it raises its staff, it's gonna strike, so
that's your cue to get the heck outta the way.
